VSP_v1a5

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference VSP_v1a5_Flat_20210210T100355.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 73F
Receive ID 761
Functional Addr 81
Functional Name VSP
